event: View of the Chapel of Saint Joseph in Saint-Tropez
description: A small whitish chapel building with a simple facade featuring a red arched door and two arched windows stands in the middle ground. A small bell tower or cross tops the roof. Behind and around it, scattered buildings of a coastal town are visible, with blue water and distant mountains in the background. The foreground shows a sloping plaza or ground in warm pinks and blues. The sky is pale blue. The style is loosely painted with broad brushstrokes and simplified forms.

_meta.title: Chapel of Saint Joseph, Saint Tropez
